title: WorkerTelemetryEvent
description: Schema for append-only worker telemetry events recording time, token, and cost facts. Each event is a discrete lifecycle observation: worker-start, worker-heartbeat, or worker-complete. Aligns with the fact-event ledger pattern and the Command Steward brief contract.

eventVersion.description: Schema version. Current is 1. Consumers must reject records with a different version.

eventType.description: Lifecycle event type. worker.start: task dispatched. worker.heartbeat: periodic progress snapshot. worker.complete: task finished.

taskId.description: Unique identifier for the worker task, matching the heartbeat taskId and active-workers entry.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this event was recorded.

issueNumber.description: GitHub issue number this task targets, if applicable.

conflictGroup.description: Conflict group identifier from the task contract, for cross-referencing with active-workers.

actorRole.description: Role that performed the work, from the task contract rolePacket.

timing.description: Wall-clock timing facts for the task.

elapsedMs.description: Wall-clock milliseconds from task start to this event capture.

softTimeMinutes.description: Budgeted soft time limit from the task contract, for utilization ratio.

hardTimeMinutes.description: Budgeted hard time limit from the task contract.

tokenUsage.description: LLM token consumption facts. The source and confidence fields distinguish actual API-reported values from estimates.

source.description: How token counts were obtained: api_response (from provider, actual), log_parse (parsed from logs, actual), estimate (computed heuristically).

confidence.description: Reliability of the token counts: high (direct API = actual), medium (parsed), low (estimated).

cachedInputTokens.description: Input tokens served from prompt cache, if reported by the provider.

apiCalls.description: Number of LLM API calls made during the task.

cost.description: Monetary cost facts for LLM usage. Separates actual provider-billed cost from estimates.

source.description: Whether cost is actual (provider-billed or API-reported) or estimated (derived from token counts and list pricing).

actualCents.description: Actual cost in cents (USD) from provider billing or API response. Null when source is estimated.

estimatedCents.description: Estimated cost in cents (USD) computed from token counts and model pricing. Null when source is actual.

currency.description: Currency for cost values. Currently only USD.

model.description: LLM model identifier used for pricing, e.g. 'claude-opus-4-7'.

pricingBasis.description: How pricing was determined: api_list (official rates), provider_billed (actual invoice), estimated, unknown.

progress.description: Progress snapshot for heartbeat events. Null for start/complete events when not applicable.

filesChanged.description: Number of files modified or created so far.

validationPassed.description: Whether validation commands have passed so far. Null if not yet run.

gateOutcome.description: Final gate result. Only populated for worker.complete events.

passed.description: Whether the task passed all gates.

reason.description: If not passed, the primary reason for gate failure.
